objective: Regenerate WOD2Sim closed-loop benchmark artifacts from scratch, validate the 10-scene pilot, and scale to the 50/100-scene public presets when an x86_64 AlpaSim runner is available.

public_artifact_policy.tracked: Compact JSON summaries, commands, tests, and public-safe metrics/hashes.
public_artifact_policy.untracked: Raw AlpaSim media, support bundles, USDZ assets, Hugging Face caches, Docker layers, and gated scene-derived files.

stages.shard_note: Shard commands reduce per-run wall time and recovery cost on constrained hosts. A claim-valid stage still requires a complete public summary for the full preset.
Shard commands reduce per-run wall time and recovery cost on constrained hosts. A claim-valid stage still requires a complete public summary for the full preset.

who_can_do_what.can_do: Review docs, run package tests, inspect dry plans and compact summaries.
who_can_do_what.requirements: Python checkout; no AlpaSim, Docker, GPU, or gated assets required.

who_can_do_what.can_do: Build metadata-valid local USDZ directories for 26.02 presets.
who_can_do_what.requirements: Hugging Face access, disk capacity, and Python dependencies; GPU optional.

who_can_do_what.can_do: Execute live AlpaSim batches and produce claim-valid batch summaries.
who_can_do_what.requirements: x86_64 Linux, Docker, NVIDIA GPU runtime, AlpaSim images, and cached scene artifacts. Use scale-stage shards on constrained hosts; shards are operational checkpoints, not a complete benchmark claim by themselves.
Live sensorsim rollouts are disabled by default because the required SensorSim image is amd64-only.
